title: Reporting out of Monday.com including photos from file column
excerpt: I would like to be able to download a line of data from a board into a report that includes any photos included.  Can anyone advise if this is possible and if not, are there any apps that may be able to help with this?

posts.author: JPope (Jackie Pope)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to be able to download a line of data from a board into a report that includes any photos included. Can anyone advise if this is possible and if not, are there any apps that may be able to help with this?
